With its smooth texture and rich aroma, it's sure to enhance the taste of your favorite recipes. Enjoy the deliciousness of Amul Unsalted Cooking Butter in every bite.

description: Nutralite Premium Fat Spread is a healthier and delicious addition to your meals. Rich in taste, this naturally cholesterol-free fat spread helps you relish your food guilt-free. It is loaded with omega-3 fatty acids, a necessary fatty acid for the body, and is rich in Vitamins A, D2, and E. Simply spread this healthy fat spread over the toast or cook pasta, sauté vegetables, and create a variety of delicious dishes.
